CITYMAP.Settings.TypeTags.Name: City Map Type Tags
CITYMAP.Settings.TypeTags.Hint: JSON array of type tags. Each entry needs an id, label, and playerMode: always, hidden, or user.
CITYMAP.Settings.PlayerVisibility.Name: City Map Visible Types
CITYMAP.Settings.PlayerVisibility.Hint: Per-user visibility preferences for adjustable city map type tags.
CITYMAP.Settings.Menu.Name: Configure City Map Types
CITYMAP.Settings.Menu.Label: City Map Types
CITYMAP.Settings.Menu.Hint: Define the type tags available to city map scene geometry.
CITYMAP.Keybindings.OpenManager.Name: Open City Map Manager
CITYMAP.Keybindings.OpenManager.Hint: Open the city map geometry and level manager for the active scene.
